# iosxe_zone_security (Data Source)

This data source can read the Zone Security configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_zone_security" "example" {
  name = "INSIDE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Zone description
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `protection` (String) config sync cookie protection against sync flood
- `vpns` (Attributes List) config vpn and zone binding list (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpns))

<a id="nestedatt--vpns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpns`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) VPN Number
